title: Start the next chapter of your story on the right track.
title-2: Build meaningful relationships Build meaningful relationships Build meaningful relationshipsBuild meaningful relationships Build meaningful relationships Build meaningful relationships
bible-study-meeting-description-1: Grow deep personal roots with the Lord and form grounding spiritual habits like daily Bible reading.
bible-study-meeting-description-2: Join out Bible study group to keep you on track and help you grow in your love for God's Word and your personal relationship with God.
bible-study-meeting-description-3: We meet in small groups during the week on the campus.
student-meeting-description: Our student meetings are a time for making friends, spiritual growth, and discovering God's plan for our lives as students together.
home-meeting-description-1: Get equipped with the living truth of the Bible and discover how it applies to our lives and guides us.
together-time-description-1: Experience a home away from home!
together-time-description-2: Get attached to a home group and enjoy weekly dinners with students and alumni in the community.
about-us-description-1: Christians on Campus is a registered student organization at SGGW whose purpose has been to bring Christ closer to students and bring students closer to Christ.
about-us-description-2: While we come from different places and backgrounds, we meet with all believers based on what unites us - our common faith.
about-us-description-3: For over 10 years we have been striving to serve SGGW students with truth and life. Through Bible study meetings, weekly meetings, and a vibrant group of students, we want to help all students seeking God find Him in a real and alive way.
